problem id: 4c23d822
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1) AND ROT(7)

examples:
  10001001 -> 00000000
  01110010 -> 00100000
  11000101 -> 10000010
  10111010 -> 01010101
  10111001 -> 01010000
  00000010 -> 00000000
  11111010 -> 01110101
  10110000 -> 01000000
  00010010 -> 00000000

query: 11110000
predicted answer: 01100000
